tasks.label: Boot iOS Simulator
tasks.command: if xcrun simctl list devices booted | grep -q 'Booted'; then echo 'iOS Simulator already running'; else DEVICE=$(xcrun simctl list devices available | grep -i 'iphone' | head -1 | awk -F'(' '{print $1}' | xargs); if [ -z "$DEVICE" ]; then open -a Simulator && echo 'Opening Simulator app...'; else open -a Simulator && sleep 2 && xcrun simctl boot "$DEVICE" 2>/dev/null && echo "Booting $DEVICE..." || echo 'Simulator booting...'; fi; sleep 3; fi

tasks.label: Boot Android Emulator
tasks.command: booted() { v=$(adb -s "$1" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r\n'); [ "$v" = "1" ]; }; if adb devices | grep emulator | grep -q 'device' && booted "$(adb devices | grep emulator | grep device | head -1 | awk '{print $1}')" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Android emulator already running'; else AVD=$(emulator -list-avds 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$AVD" ]; then emulator -avd "$AVD" & sleep 15; adb wait-for-device 2>/dev/null; for i in $(seq 1 45); do DEVICE=$(adb devices | grep emulator | grep device | head -1 | awk '{print $1}'); [ -n "$DEVICE" ] && booted "$DEVICE" && break; sleep 2; done; echo "Started $AVD"; else echo 'No AVD found. Create one in Android Studio: Tools > Device Manager'; exit 1; fi; fi

tasks.label: Run Integration Tests (Android)
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder}/example && flutter test integration_test/app_e2e_test.dart -d $(adb devices | grep emulator | head -1 | awk '{print $1}')
